title: zapoteca andina
intro: Zapoteca andina is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known for its medicinal properties and uses. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Zapoteca andina include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with malaria, as well as its potential to treat respiratory problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Zapoteca andina include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
